consolidation_metadata.objective: Unified analysis of system status box failure

executive_summary.root_cause: Multiple cascading failures preventing GPS data from reaching the frontend

primary_issues.description: Frontend calls /api/status for GPS data, but that endpoint returns spectrum analyzer data. GPS data is at /info endpoint.
Backend /info endpoint returns hardcoded San Francisco coordinates instead of real GPS from GPSD
Frontend JavaScript doesn't update the MGRS field even though HTML element exists and MGRS library is loaded
Backend has no GPSD client to fetch real GPS data despite GPSD running correctly on system

executive_summary.system_state: GPS hardware working → GPSD running → Backend ignores it → Frontend gets wrong endpoint → No data displayed

expected_flow: Backend processes GPS data and calculates MGRS
Frontend receives complete GPS + MGRS data
DOM elements updated with real values

break_points.evidence: No GPSD client code found in backend
Missing update line for gps-mgrs element

incomplete_implementation.pattern: TODO comments indicating planned but unfinished work
occurrences: server.js:640 - // TODO: Get real GPS status
server.js:641 - // TODO: Get real GPS coordinates
Missing MGRS update line in JavaScript

configuration_mismatch.pattern: Frontend expectations don't match backend reality
occurrences: Frontend expects MGRS field that backend doesn't provide
gps-bridge service is for MAVLink, not standard GPSD

partial_infrastructure.pattern: Supporting infrastructure exists but isn't connected
occurrences: GPSD running correctly but not used
MGRS library loaded but conversion result not displayed
WebSocket available but status uses polling

immediate_fixes.impact: Frontend will receive GPS data (though still hardcoded)
MGRS field will display once backend provides it

implementation.add_client: Initialize GPSD listener and connect to localhost:2947
implementation.update_endpoint: Replace hardcoded values with live GPS data

proper_fixes.impact: Real GPS data will flow to frontend
Complete GPS information including MGRS grid

architectural_improvements.rationale: Replace polling with real-time push updates

architectural_improvements.fix: Add error recovery and retry logic

gpsd_integration.rollback_strategy: Feature flag to toggle between real/mock GPS

functional_tests: IP address shows actual system IP
GPS status reflects actual connection state
performance_tests: Graceful handling of GPS signal loss

conclusion.diagnosis: System status box failure is due to multiple disconnected components: wrong API endpoint being called, hardcoded GPS data, missing MGRS update logic, and no GPSD client integration. All supporting infrastructure exists but isn't properly connected.
